facts_pipeline_verification_152073918571.content: For external npm packages (like @kody-ade/engine), verification is done by inspecting the installed CLI binary in node_modules, not by modifying source.

conventions_pipeline_verification_152074.content: Chore tasks (read-only verification) have no build step and no source changes; the implementation is just writing verify.md with PASS/FAIL.

thoughts_kody_compose_1520741735084.content: The compose skip-logic is gated on decomposeState.mergeOutcome === "merged" at line ~18312 in the compiled CLI binary.

facts_kody_compose_1520743157258.content: Phase 2 Verify + Review always run after a skipped merge, so retrying compose after failure always resumes from the verify stage.

facts_task_classification_1618599251092.content: Chore/verification tasks that don't modify source are classified as low-risk and don't require implementation beyond a verdict file

thoughts_pnpm_monorepo_1618600859730.content: pnpm's node_modules layout uses scoped paths like .pnpm/@kody-ade+engine@0.4.0_*/node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/ — glob patterns needed for path-agnostic lookup
